text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the turf incident, the URA Finale is on
track for a successful opening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, <chrname> has won
enough fans to be considered a star Umamusume
and been chosen to take part!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, <chrname>, who has
received overwhelming support as a star
Umamusume, will be taking part!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Trainer Kiryuin and Happy Meek also
managing to secure places in the race, I'm more
fired up than ever!
